params.name: Marine Chronometer
params.description:
On May 21, 1585 AD, German goldsmith Hans presented the Marine Chronometer to Rudolf II.
The Marine Chronometer is an alarm clock shaped like a ship. When it appeared at Rudolf's court banquet, all the other treasures lost their color, and only it walked on the long table. The cannons on both sides of the ship emitted cannon sounds and smoke, and even the small soldiers on the deck moved. This exquisite craftsmanship and ingenious design represented Europe's mechanical development level at th …
